creator: avg@FreeBSD.org
text:
The port should only package a sample configuration file and it should be installed as the configuration file only when the configuration file does not exist yet.
Otherwise, a modified configuration file is reported as having an incorrect checksum and the changes would get lost on the next package upgrade.

Checking for packages with mismatched checksums:
...
snapcast-0.25.0: /usr/local/etc/snapserver.conf
